Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of treating yellow jacket infestations in this historic Brooklyn neighborhood.

faqs.question: Are yellow jacket treatments safe for my Boerum Hill brownstone and family?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are highly effective against yellow jackets while remaining safe for children, pets, and the historic structures common in Boerum Hill. faqs.question: When is yellow jacket season in Boerum Hill?
faqs.answer: Yellow jackets are most active in Boerum Hill from late July through October, with peak aggression in August and September. During these months, colonies are largest and workers become more defensive when protecting their nests, making professional removal especially important for Brooklyn homeowners and businesses.
